title: Chromatic Tooltips
description: Animated, smooth color-transitioning rainbow tooltips | Fully vanilla | Lightweight & adjustable | Jade, Enhanced Tooltips & Chromatic Frames Support | MC 1.21.2+
body:
![Animation](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1649/225/v7-gif.gif)
## Overview

Chromatic Tooltips adds a simple chroma animation to any tooltip in the game. It lets tooltips smoothly transition between various colors all across the color spectrum and does not require any mods. Supports [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade), [EnhancedTooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhancedtooltips) & [Chromatic Frames](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/chromatic-frames).

**Got an idea or is something missing? [[Quick Suggest it here](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeNwFuQMNpgJ3zpGp7Xqoy6-L9HtcTJD3tdK35t_CIci-PcDw/viewform?usp=dialog)]**

![Evolution](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1663/276/evo-new-png.png)

## Customization

The chroma animation speed can be adjusted. A configuration guide for it has been included in the file. Additionally, some versions come in multiple variants, modifying the default variant, indicated by a letter after the version number.

(v9+) Jade custom themes can be disabled by setting the selected theme's style in Jade's settings to "slim".

![Styles](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1625/542/v5stylesc.png)

## Compatibility

*   Gets overridden by Legendary & Obscure Tooltips, a supported alternative is EnhancedTooltips
*   Made for 1.21.2+ as it relies on a recent vanilla feature for inventory tooltips
*   Custom animated Jade themes only work on versions 1.21.6+
*   For more vibrant frames, Chromatic Frames is supported as an add-on for this pack
***
![Ending](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1625/539/color-showcase.png)
***
